section_text_parts: Never store user's plaintext passwords. Always store a "secure hash" that you can then verify.
If you don't know, you will learn what a "password hash" is in the security chapters .
tutorial/extra-models::section-0001::adm.section_text:
Never store user's plaintext passwords. Always store a "secure hash" that you can then verify.

If you don't know, you will learn what a "password hash" is in the security chapters .

section_text_parts: The supporting additional functions fake_password_hasher and fake_save_user are just to demo a possible flow of the data, but they of course are not providing any real security.
tutorial/extra-models::section-0007::adm.section_text: The supporting additional functions fake_password_hasher and fake_save_user are just to demo a possible flow of the data, but they of course are not providing any real security.

section_text_parts: When defining a Union , include the most specific type first, followed by the less specific type. In the example below, the more specific PlaneItem comes before CarItem in Union[PlaneItem, CarItem] .
tutorial/extra-models::section-0009::adm.section_text: When defining a Union , include the most specific type first, followed by the less specific type. In the example below, the more specific PlaneItem comes before CarItem in Union[PlaneItem, CarItem] .
